name: audit-pack emits a warning when any control in compliance controls yaml has legal_review_status pending per section 2.9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --controls-file compliance/controls.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt; grep -q 'warn' out.txt && grep -q 'pending' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p compliance && printf '%b
' '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending' > compliance/controls.yaml
